title: Maket 上线平面图上传与自动识别功能
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Maket has enabled floor plan upload, letting users bring their existing plans into the platform and have them recognized and editable within minutes.
Users can upload a sketch, a listing PDF, or an old design file, which will automatically be traced for walls, doors, windows, made available on a live canvas, ready to edit and view in 3D.
00:00
Maket
@Maketplans
10h
UPLOAD YOUR OWN FLOOR PLAN TO MAKET
HAVE IT RECOGNIZED AND EDITABLE IN MINUTES
One of the most requested features weʼve ever received just launched.
Check it out:
00:00
Paid partnership
5:17 PM · Jun 11, 2026 9.2K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Maket 上线平面图上传与自动识别功能
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Maket 推出了用户最常请求的功能：支持上传平面图（包括草图、PDF 或旧设计文件），系统自动识别墙、门、窗和家具，几分钟内即可在平台上生成可编辑的 3D 画布，用户可直接修改和查看。这是该平台最受期待的功能之一。
